NUTRIBOX
Official Internal & Customer Knowledge Base
About NutriBox: NutriBox is a healthy meal subscription service designed to support various lifestyle
and fitness goals, including weight loss, weight gain, muscle building, and weight maintenance.
Customers can choose from multiple meal plans, customize their subscriptions, skip meals when
needed, and earn credits for eligible skips. 
1. Subscription Plans & Tiers
📦 Classic Box
Description: A balanced everyday meal designed for healthy eating and weight maintenance.
Nutrition: Approx. 500-600 kcal per meal. Features balanced carbohydrates, proteins, and healthy fats.
Includes fresh vegetables and lean protein sources.
Ideal For: Weight maintenance, healthy lifestyle, office workers, students, and everyday nutritious meals.
⭐ Premium

etables and lean protein sources.
Ideal For: Weight maintenance, healthy lifestyle, office workers, students, and everyday nutritious meals.
⭐ Premium Box
Description: An upgraded meal experience featuring premium ingredients and chef-special recipes.
Nutrition: Approx. 600-750 kcal per meal. Focuses on premium ingredients and enhanced meal variety.
Ideal For: Customers seeking menu variety, food enthusiasts, and premium meal subscribers.
💪 Protein Rich Box
Description: A high-protein meal plan designed for muscle growth, recovery, and active lifestyles.
Nutrition: Approx. 750-900 kcal per meal. Contains more than 40g protein per meal from high-quality
sources.
Ideal For: Gym-goers, muscle building, weight gain, athletes, and highly active individuals.
NutriBox Knowledge Base 1
🍎 Fruits

high-quality
sources.
Ideal For: Gym-goers, muscle building, weight gain, athletes, and highly active individuals.
NutriBox Knowledge Base 1
🍎 Fruits Bowl
Description: A refreshing bowl of seasonal fruits, nuts, and seeds.
Nutrition: Approx. 300-400 kcal. Rich in vitamins, minerals, and dietary fiber.
Ideal For: Weight loss, light dinner, healthy snacking, and detox-focused diets.
2. Fitness Goals & Recommended Plans
📉 Weight Loss
Recommended Plans: Fruits Bowl, Classic Box (Veg), Classic Box (Lean Non-Veg)
Rationale: Weight loss requires maintaining a calorie deficit while ensuring adequate nutrition.
Suggested Combination: Lunch: Classic Box | Dinner: Fruits Bowl
📈 Weight Gain
Recommended Plans: Protein Rich Box
Rationale: Weight gain requires a calorie surplus and adequate protein

sic Box | Dinner: Fruits Bowl
📈 Weight Gain
Recommended Plans: Protein Rich Box
Rationale: Weight gain requires a calorie surplus and adequate protein intake for muscle recovery and
growth.
Suggested Combination: Lunch: Protein Rich Box | Dinner: Protein Rich Box
Additional Suggestions: Extra egg whites, nuts and seeds, high-protein snacks.
⚖️ Weight Maintenance
Recommended Plans: Classic Box
Rationale: Provides balanced nutrition for maintaining current body weight smoothly.
Suggested Combination: Lunch and Dinner Classic Box OR a single meal slot based on customer
preference.
NutriBox Knowledge Base 2
3. Pricing & Subscription Packages
Package Type Budget Range Includes & Details
Weekly Packages ₹900 - ₹2,000 / week

Monthly Packages ₹3,500 - ₹6,000 / month
Includes Single Slot Plans, Double Slot Plans, and
Premium Upgrades. Monthly plans provide the best
overall savings.
🚚 Delivery Charges
Weekly Plans: Standard delivery charges apply (Example: ₹60 per week).
Monthly Plans: Reduced delivery cost structure, allowing savings of up to ₹200 compared to consecutive
weekly renewals.
4. Custom Plans & Menu Customization
Can Meals Be Customized? Yes. Customers can request customized meal plans tailored specifically to
unique dietary requirements, severe allergies, and long-term fitness goals.
🔄 Custom Plan Onboarding

st customized meal plans tailored specifically to
unique dietary requirements, severe allergies, and long-term fitness goals.
🔄 Custom Plan Onboarding Process
Step 1 Submit Request: Submit a formalized request through the designated "Custom Plan" section on the
user dashboard.
Step 2 Provide Details: Input clear health data including weight goals, target calories, specific allergies, and
strict ingredient restrictions.
Step 3 Dietitian Review: An in-house expert dietitian reviews the request parameters within 24 hours.
Step 4 Quotation: A personalized custom price quotation is calculated and shared with the customer.
Step 5 Activation: After payment confirmation, the custom tailored meal plan is fully activated in the kitchen
rotation.
Available Customization Metrics
Ingredient

tion: After payment confirmation, the custom tailored meal plan is fully activated in the kitchen
rotation.
Available Customization Metrics
Ingredient Exclusions: No Onion, No Garlic, No Dairy, No Gluten.
Nutrition Adjustments: High Protein, Low Carb, High Calorie, Low Calorie.
• 
• 
• 
• 
NutriBox Knowledge Base 3
Allergy Considerations: Strict isolation setups for dairy allergies, gluten sensitivities, and other dietary
restrictions.
5. Refund, Cancellation & Skip Policy
Customers may seamlessly skip specific meals directly through their integrated personal subscription
calendar interface.
⏱️ Strict Skip Deadlines
Breakfast & Lunch Slots: Must be skipped before 6:00 PM on the previous day.
Dinner Slots: Must be skipped before 10:00 AM on the current day.
💳 Eligible Skip Credits
When a

: Must be skipped before 6:00 PM on the previous day.
Dinner Slots: Must be skipped before 10:00 AM on the current day.
💳 Eligible Skip Credits
When a meal is successfully skipped before the stated cutoff window, the meal value is fully credited back to
the customer's account wallet. These credits apply automatically to cut down costs on future subscription
renewals.
❌ Subscription Cancellation
Customers can initiate cancellation at any point. Active service stops immediately, and any existing wallet
credits remain preserved and safely stored to be deployed whenever the account chooses to reactivate.
6. Credits Logic
Credits are internal meal values stored in your account wallet when eligible meals are skipped strictly prior to
the batch cutoff times. These act as direct discounts to

l meal values stored in your account wallet when eligible meals are skipped strictly prior to
the batch cutoff times. These act as direct discounts to lower renewal bills.
🟢 When Credits ARE Issued
 🔴 When Credits ARE NOT Issued
Skip request submitted before the deadline.
The meal belongs to an active, paid subscription.
The skip is fully confirmed in the system log.
Late skip requests submitted past the cutoff.
Meals that have already entered food preparation.
Meals already dispatched with delivery riders.
Customer unavailable / incorrect address /
unanswered calls.

NutriBox Knowledge Base 4
🧮 Credit Calculation Example
Monthly Classic Plan Parameters:
Total Subscription Cost: ₹3,000
Total Meals in Cycle: 24
Individual Base Meal Value: ₹3,000 / 24 = ₹125
If

on Example
Monthly Classic Plan Parameters:
Total Subscription Cost: ₹3,000
Total Meals in Cycle: 24
Individual Base Meal Value: ₹3,000 / 24 = ₹125
If exactly 2 meals are skipped cleanly before the cutoff deadlines:
Credit Earned = ₹125 × 2 = ₹250
Credit Usage & Expiry Details
Deduction: Applied entirely automatically at the next renewal phase.
Accumulation: Multiple skip credits can pile up together over multiple billing cycles.
Restrictions: Completely non-transferable between separate profiles and cannot be liquidated or paid out
into cash.
Expiry: Credits carry no arbitrary expiration dates; they stay intact waiting for renewal or account
reactivation.
⏸️ Pause vs. Skip Definitions
Skip: Applies directly to a singular, isolated calendar meal slot and generates wallet credit if

r account
reactivation.
⏸️ Pause vs. Skip Definitions
Skip: Applies directly to a singular, isolated calendar meal slot and generates wallet credit if scheduled
prior to the cutoff.
Pause: Temporarily freezes all active upcoming kitchen production and delivery completely according to
explicit subscription settings and does not yield distinct step-by-step individual meal credits.
7. Frequently Asked Questions
Q: Which plan is best for weight loss?
A: Combining a Fruits Bowl for dinner along with a Classic Box (Veg or Lean Non-Veg) for lunch is the
optimal setup for managing a healthy calorie deficit.
Q: Which plan is best for weight gain?
A: The Protein Rich Box is recommended because it packs over 40g of protein and delivers an efficient
750-900 kcal per serving.
•

The Protein Rich Box is recommended because it packs over 40g of protein and delivers an efficient
750-900 kcal per serving.

NutriBox Knowledge Base 5
Q: Which plan is best for maintaining weight?
A: The Classic Box is engineered specifically for everyday balanced nutrition and stable weight
maintenance.
Q: Can I customize my meals?
A: Yes. Customers can open custom plan tickets anytime to coordinate specific allergen removal, macro
targets, and ingredient exclusions.
Q: Can I skip meals?
A: Absolutely. Skipping is managed straight from your personal profile's subscription calendar page.
Q: Can I get a refund for skipped meals?
A: Direct cash refunds are not offered. Instead, validated skipped meals translate into account wallet
credits which discount future

or skipped meals?
A: Direct cash refunds are not offered. Instead, validated skipped meals translate into account wallet
credits which discount future billing loops.
Q: Can I transfer credits?
A: No. Wallet credits are non-transferable and can only be used by the profile that originally generated
them.
Q: How do I view my credits?
A: Total available credits are tracked live under the "Credits & Wallet" tab on your main account dashboard.
Q: What happens if I cancel my subscription?
A: Active operations halt right away, and your accrued wallet balance is stored securely to be spent
whenever you decide to reactivate.
Q: What if I miss the skip deadline?
A: Credits cannot be retroactively assigned if you miss the cutoff, as raw food provisioning, kitchen
preparation, and delivery routing

skip deadline?
A: Credits cannot be retroactively assigned if you miss the cutoff, as raw food provisioning, kitchen
preparation, and delivery routing logs for that batch are already underway.
NutriBox Knowledge Base 6
